features.title: Code Review & Foundational Improvements
features.description: First-pass code review with bug fixes, dead code removal, dark mode, new Liabilities page, and project documentation.
changes: Removed dead Sidebar.tsx (replaced by AppLayout inline sidebar)
Fixed NavLink root route with `end` prop to prevent always-active state
Moved mobile padding (pt-12) from every page into AppLayout centralised
Added dark mode toggle (Sun/Moon) in sidebar with localStorage persistence
Fixed type safety: removed `as any` casts in AssetsPage
Created LiabilitiesPage with full CRUD (mortgages, loans, credit cards, HECS)
Added Liabilities nav item to sidebar and route to App.tsx
